dashboard.label: Purple Team Home Lab — SOC L2 Detection Dashboard
dashboard.description: AD attack chain detection coverage | MARVEL.LOCAL | Sysmon + Windows Security

search.query: source="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4771 | rex field=Message "Failure Code:\s+(?<fc>\S+)" | search fc="0x18" | stats count
source="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4769 | rex field=Message "Ticket Encryption Type:\s+(?<enc>\S+)" | search enc="0x17" | stats count

source="WinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=3 | rex field=Message "Image:\s*(?<Image>[^\r\n]+)" | search Image="*\\Temp\\*" OR Image="*\\AppData\\*" OR Image="*\\ProgramData\\*" | stats count

source="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4624 | rex field=Message "Logon Type:\s+(?<lt>\S+)" | rex field=Message "Source Network Address:\s+(?<src>[^\r\n]+)" | search lt="3" src="192.168.182.133" | stats count

panel.title: MITRE ATT&CK Coverage — Events by Technique

search.query: index=main (source="WinEventLog:Security" OR source="WinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" OR source="WinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Windows Defender/Operational") | eval technique=case( EventCode=4768, "T1087.002 Recon/Enum", EventCode=4771, "T1110.003 Password Spray", EventCode=4769, "T1558.003 Kerberoasting", EventCode=4688 AND match(Message,"InstallUtil"), "T1218.004 LOLBin", EventCode=3 AND match(Message,"\\\\Temp\\\\"), "T1071.001 C2 Beacon", EventCode=4624 AND match(Message,"Logon Type:\s+3"), "T1550 Lateral Move", EventCode=4688 AND match(Message,"reg.*save"), "T1003.002 SAM Dump", EventCode=4662 AND match(Message,"1131f6aa"), "T1003.006 DCSync", EventCode=4698, "T1053.005 Persistence", (EventCode=1116 OR EventCode=1117), "T1059 AMSI Block", true(), null() ) | where isnotnull(technique) | stats count by technique | sort - count

index=main (source="WinEventLog:Security" OR source="WinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational") EventCode IN (4768, 4771, 4769, 4624, 4688, 4698, 4662, 3, 10) | eval phase=case( EventCode=4768 OR EventCode=4771, "Spray/Enum", EventCode=4769, "Kerberoasting", EventCode=3, "C2 Beacon", EventCode=4624, "Lateral Move", EventCode=4688, "Execution", EventCode=4698, "Persistence", EventCode=4662, "DCSync", EventCode=10, "LSASS Access", true(), "Other" ) | timechart span=10m count by phase limit=10

source="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4771 | rex field=Message "Account Name:\s+(?<Account_Name>\S+)" | rex field=Message "Client Address:\s+(?<Client_Address>\S+)" | rex field=Message "Failure Code:\s+(?<Failure_Code>\S+)" | search Failure_Code="0x18" | bucket _time span=5m | stats dc(Account_Name) as unique_users values(Account_Name) as targets by _time Client_Address | where unique_users >= 3 | sort - _time

source="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4769 | rex field=Message "Account Name:\s+(?<Account_Name>[^\r\n]+)" | rex field=Message "Service Name:\s+(?<Service_Name>[^\r\n]+)" | rex field=Message "Ticket Encryption Type:\s+(?<Encryption_Type>\S+)" | rex field=Message "Client Address:\s+::ffff:(?<Client_Address>\S+)" | search Encryption_Type="0x17" Service_Name!="krbtgt" Service_Name!="*$" | table _time Client_Address Account_Name Service_Name Encryption_Type | sort - _time

panel.title: Lateral Movement — Network Logon from Kali (T1550)

search.query: source="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4624 | rex field=Message "Account Name:\s+(?<Account_Name>[^\r\n]+)" | rex field=Message "Logon Type:\s+(?<Logon_Type>\S+)" | rex field=Message "Source Network Address:\s+(?<Source_IP>[^\r\n]+)" | search Logon_Type="3" Source_IP="192.168.182.133" | table _time host Account_Name Logon_Type Source_IP | sort - _time

panel.title: DCSync — Replication Rights from User Account (T1003.006)

search.query: source="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4662 | rex field=Message "Account Name:\s+(?<Account_Name>[^\r\n]+)" | rex field=Message "Properties:\s+(?<Properties>[^\r\n]+)" | search (Properties="*1131f6aa*" OR Properties="*1131f6ad*") Account_Name!="*$" | table _time host Account_Name Properties | sort - _time

source="WinEventLog:Security" EventCode=4698 | rex field=Message "Account Name:\s+(?<Account_Name>[^\r\n]+)" | rex field=Message "Task Name:\s+(?<Task_Name>[^\r\n]+)" | rex field=Message "<Command>(?<Command>[^<]+)</Command>" | rex field=Message "<UserId>(?<RunAs>[^<]+)</UserId>" | where like(Command,"%\\Temp\\%") OR like(Command,"%\\AppData\\%") OR RunAs="S-1-5-18" | table _time host Account_Name Task_Name Command RunAs | sort - _time

panel.title: Defender / AMSI Blocks — Blue Team Win (T1059)

search.query: source="WinEventLog:Microsoft-Windows-Sysmon/Operational" EventCode=10 | rex field=Message "TargetImage:\s*(?<TargetImage>[^\r\n]+)" | rex field=Message "SourceImage:\s*(?<SourceImage>[^\r\n]+)" | rex field=Message "GrantedAccess:\s*(?<GrantedAccess>\S+)" | search TargetImage="*lsass.exe" (GrantedAccess="0x1010" OR GrantedAccess="0x1410" OR GrantedAccess="0x1438" OR GrantedAccess="0x1fffff") SourceImage!="*wininit.exe" SourceImage!="*MsMpEng.exe" | table _time host SourceImage TargetImage GrantedAccess | sort - _time
